mapper.sql: c.id, c.case_number, c.title, c.type_code, dct.name as type_name, c.status, c.reporter_name, c.reporter_contact, c.incident_time, c.incident_location, c.brief_description, c.creator_id, cu.name as creator_name, c.handling_officer_id, u.name as handling_officer_name, c.department_id, dep.name as department_name, c.acceptance_time, c.deadline_time, c.is_overdue, c.created_at, c.updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into cases ( case_number, title, type_code, status, reporter_name, reporter_contact, incident_time, incident_location, brief_description, creator_id, handling_officer_id, department_id, acceptance_time, deadline_time, is_overdue, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{caseNumber}, #{title}, #{typeCode}, #{status}, #{reporterName}, #{reporterContact}, #{incidentTime}, #{incidentLocation}, #{briefDescription}, #{creatorId}, #{handlingOfficerId}, #{departmentId}, #{acceptanceTime}, #{deadlineTime}, #{isOverdue}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: select from cases c left join dict_case_types dct on dct.code = c.type_code left join users cu on cu.id = c.creator_id left join users u on u.id = c.handling_officer_id left join departments dep on dep.id = c.department_id where c.id = #{id}

select from cases c left join dict_case_types dct on dct.code = c.type_code left join users cu on cu.id = c.creator_id left join users u on u.id = c.handling_officer_id left join departments dep on dep.id = c.department_id where c.case_number = #{caseNumber}
select count(1) from cases c where c.deadline_time is not null and c.deadline_time >= now() and c.deadline_time <= #{deadlineBefore} and c.status not in ('ARCHIVED', 'EXECUTED')

select from cases c left join dict_case_types dct on dct.code = c.type_code left join users cu on cu.id = c.creator_id left join users u on u.id = c.handling_officer_id left join departments dep on dep.id = c.department_id where c.deadline_time is not null and c.deadline_time >= now() and c.deadline_time <= #{deadlineBefore} and c.status not in ('ARCHIVED', 'EXECUTED') order by c.deadline_time asc, c.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
select count(1) from cases c where c.deadline_time is not null and c.deadline_time < #{deadlineBefore} and c.status not in ('ARCHIVED', 'EXECUTED')

select from cases c left join dict_case_types dct on dct.code = c.type_code left join users cu on cu.id = c.creator_id left join users u on u.id = c.handling_officer_id left join departments dep on dep.id = c.department_id where c.deadline_time is not null and c.deadline_time < #{deadlineBefore} and c.status not in ('ARCHIVED', 'EXECUTED') order by c.deadline_time asc, c.id desc limit #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.update: update cases set is_overdue = case when deadline_time is not null and deadline_time < #{deadlineBefore} and status not in ('ARCHIVED', 'EXECUTED') then 1 else 0 end

update cases set title = #{title}, type_code = #{typeCode}, reporter_name = #{reporterName}, reporter_contact = #{reporterContact}, incident_time = #{incidentTime}, incident_location = #{incidentLocation}, brief_description = #{briefDescription}, department_id = #{departmentId}, deadline_time = #{deadlineTime}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update cases set handling_officer_id = #{handlingOfficerId}, department_id = #{departmentId}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update cases set status = #{status}, acceptance_time = #{acceptanceTime}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select cp.*, u.name as operator_name from case_processes cp left join users u on u.id = cp.operator_id where cp.case_id = #{caseId} order by cp.id desc
select cp.*, u.name as operator_name from case_processes cp left join users u on u.id = cp.operator_id where cp.case_id = #{caseId} and cp.to_status = 'ARCHIVED' order by cp.id desc limit 1
select ce.*, u.name as upload_user_name from case_evidences ce left join users u on u.id = ce.upload_user_id where ce.id = #{evidenceId}
mapper.update: update case_evidences set file_name = #{fileName}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_type = #{fileType}, file_size = #{fileSize}, description = #{description} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select ce.*, u.name as upload_user_name from case_evidences ce left join users u on u.id = ce.upload_user_id where ce.case_id = #{caseId} order by ce.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into case_legal_reviews ( case_id, review_status, review_comment, reviewer_id, reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{caseId}, #{reviewStatus}, #{reviewComment}, #{reviewerId}, #{reviewedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) on duplicate key update review_status = values(review_status), review_comment = values(review_comment), reviewer_id = values(reviewer_id), reviewed_at = values(reviewed_at), updated_at = values(updated_at)

insert into case_decisions ( case_id, decision_result, decision_content, coercive_measure_code, decided_by, decided_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{caseId}, #{decisionResult}, #{decisionContent}, #{coerciveMeasureCode}, #{decidedBy}, #{decidedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) on duplicate key update decision_result = values(decision_result), decision_content = values(decision_content), coercive_measure_code = values(coercive_measure_code), decided_by = values(decided_by), decided_at = values(decided_at), updated_at = values(updated_at)

insert into case_executions ( case_id, execution_result, execution_note, executed_by, executed_at, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{caseId}, #{executionResult}, #{executionNote}, #{executedBy}, #{executedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) on duplicate key update execution_result = values(execution_result), execution_note = values(execution_note), executed_by = values(executed_by), executed_at = values(executed_at), updated_at = values(updated_at)
